listings.name: Love's Travel Stop #629
listings.description: 24-hour Love's Travel Stop on I-65 at Exit 108 (TN-76) in White House. Diesel and DEF, showers, convenience store, ATM, dog park, Wi-Fi, and dedicated truck parking. On-site CAT Scale and Love's Truck Care / Speedco service center are listed separately.
listings.corroboration: Address 1001 Highway 76, White House 37188, Exit 108 (TN-76), and phone 615-672-0261 consistent across Love's official location URL, Yelp, Find Truck Service, Yellow Pages, and Interstate Logos. 83 parking spaces / 7 showers / CAT Scale reported by Find Truck Service and Speedco/Love's Truck Care listings. Official loves.com and catscale.com are policy-blocked to WebFetch in this environment; verified via search snippets from >=2 independent directories.

listings.name: CAT Scale — Love's Travel Stop #629, White House
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Love's Travel Stop #629 on I-65 at Exit 108 (TN-76) in White House. Weigh service available during travel-stop hours.
listings.corroboration: CAT Scale at I-65/TN-76 Exit 108, White House, phone 615-672-0261 listed by Allstays CAT Scale directory and corroborated by the Love's #629 amenity listing (CAT Scale) and Speedco service-center description. catscale.com locator is policy-blocked to WebFetch; identity confirmed via >=2 independent sources.

listings.name: Love's Truck Care / Speedco — Love's #629, White House
listings.description: Love's Truck Care (Speedco) heavy-duty truck service center co-located at Love's Travel Stop #629 on I-65 at Exit 108 in White House. Commercial tire sales/service (Bridgestone, Michelin, Goodyear, Yokohama, Love's Retread), oil change / PM, light mechanical, and emergency roadside assistance.
listings.corroboration: Love's Truck Care at 1001 Hwy 76, White House (I-65 Exit 108) confirmed by Yelp, Find Truck Service (#629), and TruckDown Speedco listing; tire brands and services consistent across sources. Official loves.com/speedco policy-blocked to WebFetch; verified via >=2 independent directories.

listings.name: MAPCO Express #1028
listings.description: Independent/branded MAPCO truck stop on I-65 at Exit 112 (TN-25) in Cross Plains. 24-hour diesel, bulk DEF, Subway/deli, convenience store, showers, Wi-Fi, and truck parking.
listings.corroboration: MAPCO Express #1028 at 8631 Hwy 25 E, Cross Plains 37049, I-65 Exit 112, phone 615-654-2599, ~30 truck spaces, 6 fuel lanes, showers, Subway confirmed across TruckMap, Fueloyal, FindFuelStops, iExit, and Allstays. Actively listed in current directories.

listings.name: Park City Truck Park (Truck Parking Club)
listings.description: Reservable truck and trailer parking at Park City - Nashville Truck Parking near I-65 north of Nashville in Goodlettsville. Large gravel lot with 24/7 access; short- and long-term (hourly/daily/weekly/monthly) reservations via Truck Parking Club. Lounge/showers reported as planned/under development.
listings.corroboration: 7409 Cycle Lane, Goodlettsville 37072, phone 615-484-5781, ~30 available (101 capacity) gravel lot with 24/7 access confirmed by Truck Parking Club, Carrier Network, TruxSpot, TruckerPath, and the operator's Facebook page. Exit number left blank: one source cited Exit 104 but it was not independently corroborated, so it is not asserted.

listings.name: Twice Daily / Daily's #6603 (Goodlettsville)
listings.description: Twice Daily / Daily's #6603 fuel and convenience travel center on I-65 at Exit 97 (TN-174, Long Hollow Pike) in Goodlettsville. 24-hour diesel, bulk DEF, convenience store, ATM. Held: reported truck parking is minimal/conflicting (sources indicate 'no parking' to ~2 spaces), so overnight truck-stop category-fit is unconfirmed.
listings.hold_reason: Truck parking minimal/unconfirmed (sources conflict: 'no parking' vs ~2 public spaces); functions primarily as a fuel/convenience stop rather than an overnight truck stop. Category-fit and truck parking not independently confirmed.
listings.corroboration: Location 150 Long Hollow Pike, Goodlettsville 37072, I-65 Exit 97, 24-hour diesel/DEF confirmed by TruckMap, Yelp, and iExit. Truck parking capacity conflicting across directories (no parking vs ~2 spaces); held pending confirmation of overnight truck access.

listings.name: Tennessee Weigh Station — I-65 Southbound (Robertson County, near KY line)
listings.description: Southbound Tennessee weigh/inspection station on I-65 in Robertson County near the Kentucky state line (SR 25 / Mitchellville area, roughly MM 121). Per TDOT, the southbound station was being rebuilt with new scales, a truck inspection station, and ~36 additional parking spaces (contract let June 2024, estimated completion Q3 2026). Held pending confirmation of exact mile marker and current operational status during/after construction.
listings.hold_reason: Direction (southbound) and general location confirmed via TDOT project page, but exact mile marker and current operational status are uncertain due to active reconstruction (est. completion Q3 2026). TDOT/THP pages are policy-blocked to WebFetch; not independently field-verified.
listings.corroboration: TDOT I-65 (Nashville-to-KY-line) project page describes a southbound weigh station being upgraded with new scales, truck inspection station, and ~36 parking spaces; iExit lists an I-65 TN weigh station. Held per conservative rule pending exact-location and operating-status confirmation.

listings.name: I-65 Northbound Truck Parking Area (former weigh station, Robertson County)
listings.description: Per TDOT, the former northbound I-65 weigh station in Robertson County (near the Kentucky state line / SR 25) was converted into a truck parking area during a widening project completed September 19, 2024. Held: facility name, number of spaces, exact location, and legal overnight-parking status are not independently confirmed.
listings.hold_reason: State-operated (unnamed) parking area; capacity, exact mile marker, and legal overnight-parking status unconfirmed. TDOT page policy-blocked to WebFetch; not independently field-verified.
listings.corroboration: TDOT project description (via search snippet) states the northbound weigh station was converted into a truck parking area (phase completed 9/19/2024). Single authoritative source only and policy-blocked to WebFetch; held pending direct confirmation.

excluded.name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Nashville
excluded.reason: Located at I-24 Exit 62 (611 Muci Dr), serves I-24 — not the I-65 northern segment; out of scope.

excluded.name: CAT Scale / TA — Franklin (Exit 61)
excluded.reason: I-65 Exit 61 is south of Nashville, outside this segment's exit 90-121 range.

excluded.name: CAT Scale — Nashville (I-24/I-65 Exit 87A)
excluded.reason: Downtown Nashville junction, south of the segment's northern range and primarily an I-24/I-65 split location.

excluded.name: Exxon (AM Express) / Shell — Portland Exit 117
excluded.reason: Fuel/convenience stations with diesel but no confirmed dedicated truck parking; category-fit as a truck stop not verified. Earlier 'Love's at Exit 117' references were a mix-up with I-24 and are not real.

excluded.name: Holiday Inn Express / Hampton Inn / Quality Inn — White House (Exit 108)
excluded.reason: Hotels near Exit 108; truck/semi overnight parking not independently confirmed (brand pages do not verify truck parking, and Love's #629 truck parking is adjacent). Held out pending confirmation.

excluded.name: Interstate Fleet Services / West Power Services / TRUCKUP / Mobile Tractor Trailer Repair
excluded.reason: Mobile roadside dispatch services without a confirmed fixed street address or verifiable single-facility identity in this segment; excluded per no-guess rule.

excluded.name: Millersville travel center (Exit 98)
excluded.reason: No dedicated truck stop / travel center with truck parking confirmed at Exit 98 (US-31W); gas stations only.

excluded.name: Robertson County Welcome Center (SB, ~MM 121, Mitchellville)
excluded.reason: Welcome center / rest area is not one of the eight target categories; not created as its own row. (Associated weigh-station and truck-parking items handled separately as held listings.)
